title: Musclekarp & Friends [Cobblemon]
description: Adds the cursed evolution Musclekarp and his many friends.
body:
Thanks to Veraxiel from the Cobblemon team for all the help! This wouldn't have been possible without him.

This datapack adds a cursed new Cobblemon Musclekarp and his friends to your world. If you need to know how to obtain them, you can find out in the README text file in the pack.

Origin of each Pokemon:

Musclekarp: https://pokemon-fighters-ex-roblox.fandom.com/wiki/Musclekarp

Neferkiti: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0XhOm_9_uPk

Lord Helix: https://helixpedia.fandom.com/wiki/Lord_Helix

Better screenshots for the gallery coming soon
